title: Cannot run ´sudo dnf update´ after clean podman machine init
body:
### Issue Description

Cannot run ´sudo dnf update´ after clean podman machine init. Getting no space left.

## Version
--
`root@localhost:~# podman version
Client:        Podman Engine
Version:       5.5.0
API Version:   5.5.0
Go Version:    go1.23.8
Git Commit:    0dbcb51477ee7ab8d3b47d30facf71fc38bb0c98
Built:         Tue May 13 02:00:00 2025
Build Origin:  Copr: packit/containers-podman-26126
OS/Arch:       linux/arm64`
--

root@localhost:~# rpm -q podman
podman-5.5.0-1.20250513190153884041.pr26126.30.0dbcb51477.fc41.aarch64

-- 

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Create a machine `podman machine init`
2. Get into it `podman machine ssh`
3. Run `sudo dnf update`


### Describe the results you received


## Problem

I am trying to run `sudo dnf update` or try to install any package after a clean `podman machine init`, but I'm getting two errors. 

First is when ran with just `sudo dnf update` I get 

`Running transaction
Importing OpenPGP key 0xE99D6AD1:
 UserID     : "Fedora (41) <fedora-41-primary@fedoraproject.org>"
 Fingerprint: 466CF2D8B60BC3057AA9453ED0622462E99D6AD1
 From       : file:///etc/pki/rpm-gpg/RPM-GPG-KEY-fedora-41-aarch64
Is this ok [y/N]: y
Transaction failed: Signature verification failed.
An error occurred importing key "file:///etc/pki/rpm-gpg/RPM-GPG-KEY-fedora-41-aarch64": Failed to import public key "file:///etc/pki/rpm-gpg/RPM-GPG-KEY-fedora-41-aarch64" to rpmdb: can't create transaction lock on /usr/share/rpm/.rpm.lock (Read-only file system)
OpenPGP check for package "kernel-6.14.9-200.fc41.aarch64" (/var/cache/libdnf5/updates-f5bf130a412ac3b6/packages/kernel-6.14.9-200.fc41.aarch64.rpm) from repo "updates" has failed: Public key import failed.`

I try to run it with `sudo dnf update --nogpgcheck` it runs, and I get:

`  - installing package WALinuxAgent-udev-2.13.1.1-1.fc41.noarch needs 291MB more space on the / filesystem`

I clearly have space left:

`root@localhost:~# df -h
Filesystem                            Size  Used Avail Use% Mounted on
/dev/vda4                             100G  4.5G   95G   5% /sysroot
devtmpfs                              4.0M     0  4.0M   0% /dev
tmpfs                                 974M  200K  974M   1% /dev/shm
efivarfs                               56K  1.9K   55K   4% /sys/firmware/efi/efivars
tmpfs                                 390M  584K  389M   1% /run
tmpfs                                 974M     0  974M   0% /tmp
tmpfs                                 1.0M     0  1.0M   0% /run/credentials/systemd-network-generator.service
tmpfs                                 1.0M     0  1.0M   0% /run/credentials/systemd-journald.service
tmpfs                                 1.0M     0  1.0M   0% /run/credentials/systemd-udev-load-credentials.service
tmpfs                                 1.0M     0  1.0M   0% /run/credentials/systemd-sysctl.service
tmpfs                                 1.0M     0  1.0M   0% /run/credentials/systemd-tmpfiles-setup-dev-early.service
tmpfs                                 1.0M     0  1.0M   0% /run/credentials/systemd-sysusers.service
tmpfs                                 1.0M     0  1.0M   0% /run/credentials/systemd-tmpfiles-setup-dev.service
tmpfs                                 1.0M     0  1.0M   0% /run/credentials/systemd-vconsole-setup.service
a2a0ee2c717462feb1de2f5afd59de5fd2d8  461G  358G  104G  78% /Users
71708eb255bc230cd7c91dd26f7667a7b938  461G  358G  104G  78% /private
/dev/vda3                             350M  147M  181M  45% /boot
a0bb3a2c8b0b02ba5958b0576f0d6530e104  461G  358G  104G  78% /var/folders
tmpfs                                 1.0M     0  1.0M   0% /run/credentials/systemd-tmpfiles-setup.service
rosetta                               461G  358G  104G  78% /var/mnt
tmpfs                                 195M   16K  195M   1% /run/user/501
tmpfs                                 1.0M     0  1.0M   0% /run/credentials/getty@tty1.service
tmpfs                                 1.0M     0  1.0M   0% /run/credentials/serial-getty@hvc0.service
tmpfs                                 195M  4.0K  195M   1% /run/user/0`

This might be something newbie... but I haven't found any answer yet.

### Describe the results you expected

I expect the packages to update.

### podman info output

### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

Rootless

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

Additional environment details

### Additional information

Additional information like issue happens only occasionally or issue happens with a particular architecture or on a particular setting

comments.body: My bad. Was using a wrong syntax.
